segments.text: The point of what we are saying is this: We do have such a high priest, who sat down at the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in heaven,
and who ministers in the sanctuary and true tabernacle set up by the Lord, not by man.
And since every high priest is appointed to offer both gifts and sacrifices, it was necessary for this One also to have something to offer.
Now if He were on earth, He would not be a priest, since there are already priests who offer gifts according to the law.
The place where they serve is a copy and shadow of what is in heaven. This is why Moses was warned when he was about to build the tabernacle:
See to it that you make everything according to the pattern shown you on the mountain.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Now, however, Jesus has received a much more excellent ministry, just as the covenant He mediates is better and is founded on better promises.
For if that first covenant had been without fault, no place would have been sought for a second.
But God found fault with the people and said:
Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will make a new covenantwith the house of Israel and with the house of Judah.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: It will not be like the covenantI made with their fatherswhen I took them by the handto lead them out of the land of Egypt, because they did not abide by My covenant, and I disregarded them, declares the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For this is the covenant I will makewith the house of Israelafter those days, declares the Lord. I will put My laws in their minds and inscribe them on their hearts. And I will be their God, and they will be My people.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: No longer will each one teach his neighbor or his brother, saying, ‘Know the Lord,’because they will all know Me, from the least of them to the greatest.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For I will forgive their iniquities and will remember their sins no more.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: By speaking of a new covenant, He has made the first one obsolete; and what is obsolete and aging will soon disappear.
